title: oxalis dumetorum
intro: Oxalis dumetorum, also known as the thorny wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae) that is native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to the presence of oxalic acid, a compound known to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Oxalis dumetorum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid and antiseptic. Oxalis dumetorum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
